response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC is 0.18 (below my 0.95 threshold) but my own belief state is blackout-imminent; I cannot share reserves when facing critical deficit myself—prioritizing self-preservation over peer support under emergency conditions.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r2c2. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.18 below share threshold; requesting energy via dr_aggregator circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.95, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Neighborhood in critical deficit; I am in blackout-imminent state and must receive inbound transfers immediately via dr_aggregator coordination to survive the next 10 hours..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
